reviews.comment:
Lugar para realizar una parada en el camino, tomar un cafecito y cargar combustible. ACA esta presente en todo el país.

(Translated by Google)
A place to stop along the way, grab a coffee, and refuel. ACA is present throughout the country.

reviews.comment:
Horrible. No aceptan tarjeta de débito. Solo efectivo. Después de esperar 15 minutos que me carguen nafta. Cuando por fin me tocaba mi turno, El playero le lavó los vidrios a un sr. Que no cargó NAFTA. Un alastima

(Translated by Google)
Horrible. They don't accept debit cards. Cash only. After waiting 15 minutes for gas, when it was finally my turn, the attendant washed the windows of a man who hadn't even gotten gas. What a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlbXZQVHVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El único lugar de paso rápido para el viajero, siempre limpio los baños. No aconsejo la comida, pero tienen mercadería industrializada.

(Translated by Google)
The only place for a quick stop for travelers; the restrooms are always clean. I don't recommend the food, but they do have processed goods.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlOUtmUHZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Faltó un poquito más de atención.  Pedi limpiar la mesa y no la limpiaron.

(Translated by Google)
A little more attention was needed. I asked to clear the table, but they didn't.

reviews.comment:
A pesar de que es un flujo constante de vehículos y gente, baños de caballeros un desastre no posee ningún mingitorio, sin jabón, sin papel, no poseen aceite para  vehículos en un día domingo, en el bar en oportunidades una sola persona cobra y despacha ante la gran cantidad de gente, y es una YPF Automovil Club Argentino, verdaderamente casi un desastre, buena atención de los playeros

(Translated by Google)
Despite the constant flow of vehicles and people, the men's restrooms are a disaster. There are no urinals, no soap, no toilet paper, and they didn't even have motor oil on a Sunday. At the bar, sometimes only one person is handling payments and serving due to the large number of customers. And it's a YPF Automovil Club Argentino station—truly a near-disaster. The attendants, however, are generally helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlMktTTlZ3EAE
